title: Air pollutants - Canada.ca
content:
Airborne, impact, criteria air contaminants, heavy metals, toxics, reaction, sources.

## Services and information

### Criteria air contaminants
Pollutants, air issues, ozone, secondary particulate, chemical reactions, fossil fuels, emissions.
Sources, fine particles, persistent organic pollutants, hazardous air pollutants, micronutrients.
Air quality issues, list of all air related toxics.

### National Pollutant Release Inventory
Guidance and tools on reporting to the inventory, accessing, analyzing and downloading data.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
